name: Push CA into Container
description: Pushes the deployer's CA certificate (from the PVE host's /usr/local/share/ca-certificates/proxvex-ca.crt) into the LXC container's system trust store. This way skopeo on the host and docker inside the container — via Docker's system-trust fallback — both trust the local registry mirror without per-app HTTP downloads. No-op when the host has no CA file.

parameters.name: ID of the virtual machine
parameters.description: ID of the LXC container that just got created
